marketing.heroTitle: AI-tailored resumes for every job you apply to
marketing.heroSubtitle: Fetch roles, generate a custom CV and cover letter matched to each JD, export PDF. One workflow, zero copy-paste.
marketing.demoJd1: Experience with Kubernetes and container orchestration...
marketing.demoCv1: Led **Kubernetes** migration for 200-service platform, reducing inter-service latency by 15%
marketing.demoCl2: My recent work in **cross-functional** delivery and stakeholder alignment has given me direct experience...
marketing.demoCv3: Built **Terraform** modules for multi-region AWS infrastructure, enabling zero-downtime deployments
marketing.howItWorksStep1Desc: Search LinkedIn, Seek, and CN platforms. New roles land in your inbox automatically.
marketing.howItWorksStep2Desc: AI matches your experience to each JD. Bullet-level tailoring with keyword bolding and quality gates.
marketing.howItWorksStep3Desc: One-click PDF export. ATS-optimized resume and cover letter, ready to send.
marketing.featureSkillPackDesc: 35 CV rules + 29 Cover rules. FAANG-recruiter grade quality with 18 self-validation checks.
marketing.featureAtsDesc: Keywords aligned to each JD. Bullet length under 200 chars. Passes Workday, Greenhouse, Lever.
marketing.featureBilingualDesc: Full en-AU and zh-CN support with locale-specific tone rules and templates.
marketing.featureBatchDesc: Generate tailored CVs for 10+ jobs in one batch. Claim-and-generate automation.
marketing.featureExternalAiDesc: Download Skill Pack ZIP. Import into Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini.
marketing.featureLatexDesc: Professional LaTeX-rendered PDFs. Not Word templates. Real typographic quality.
marketing.beforeAfterBefore: Worked on data processing and helped improve system performance
marketing.beforeAfterAfter: Designed **event-driven** data pipeline processing 2M+ events daily, reducing processing latency from 12s to 800ms
marketing.beforeAfterTagline: Every bullet. Every application. Grounded in YOUR experience.
marketing.finalCtaTitle: Stop sending the same resume everywhere
marketing.finalCtaSubtitle: No credit card required. Google or GitHub login.

extensionGuide.title: Joblit AutoFill — Chrome Extension
extensionGuide.subtitle: Auto-fill job applications on Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, iCIMS, SuccessFactors, and more.
extensionGuide.downloadDesc: Download the latest Joblit AutoFill extension package (.zip) from GitHub Releases.
extensionGuide.downloadNote: The extension is distributed as a .zip package. After downloading, you must unzip it to a folder before installing. Chrome Web Store listing coming soon.
extensionGuide.installStep1: Unzip the downloaded file to a folder on your computer.
extensionGuide.installStep2: Open Chrome and navigate to chrome://extensions in the address bar.
extensionGuide.installStep3: Enable "Developer mode" using the toggle in the top-right corner.
extensionGuide.installStep4: Click "Load unpacked" and select the unzipped folder.
extensionGuide.installStep5: The Joblit AutoFill extension icon will appear in your toolbar.
extensionGuide.installTip: Pin the extension for quick access: click the puzzle icon in the toolbar, then click the pin next to Joblit AutoFill.
extensionGuide.accountDesc: Sign up or log in to Joblit using your Google or GitHub account, then set up your resume profile.
extensionGuide.accountStep1: Log in with Google or GitHub.
extensionGuide.accountStep2: Navigate to the Resume page and fill in your master resume profile.
extensionGuide.accountStep3: This profile data is what the extension uses to auto-fill applications.
extensionGuide.tokenDesc: Create a secure token to connect the extension to your Joblit account.
extensionGuide.tokenStep1: Go to the Extension page in your Joblit dashboard.
extensionGuide.tokenStep2: Enter a name for the token (e.g. "My Laptop Chrome") and click Generate.
extensionGuide.tokenStep3: Copy the token immediately — it will only be shown once.
extensionGuide.tokenNote: Tokens are valid for 90 days. You can generate multiple tokens for different devices.
extensionGuide.connectStep1: Click the Joblit AutoFill icon in the Chrome toolbar.
extensionGuide.connectStep2: Paste the token you copied and click Connect.
extensionGuide.connectStep3: You'll see your name, title, and email — you're connected!
extensionGuide.useDesc: Visit any supported ATS job application page. The extension detects form fields and shows a floating widget for reviewing results.
extensionGuide.useMethod1Desc: Click the Joblit icon in the toolbar and hit "Fill Current Page" to fill all detected fields.
extensionGuide.useMethod2Desc: Press Alt+Shift+F to instantly fill all detected fields on the current page.
extensionGuide.useMethod3Desc: View filled results, manually edit values, and save corrections to the Knowledge Base for future auto-fill.
extensionGuide.supportedDesc: Works out of the box with the most popular Applicant Tracking Systems:
extensionGuide.faq1A: Yes. The extension communicates with your Joblit account over HTTPS. Your resume data stays in your account. Tokens are hashed and never stored in plain text.
extensionGuide.faq2Q: What if a field is filled incorrectly?
extensionGuide.faq2A: Edit the value directly in the floating widget and click Save. The correction is stored in your Knowledge Base — next time the extension will use your preferred value automatically.
extensionGuide.faq3Q: Does it work on multi-step forms?
extensionGuide.faq3A: Yes. After filling the current page, the extension detects "Next" buttons and auto-fills subsequent pages.
extensionGuide.faq4Q: My token expired. What do I do?
extensionGuide.faq4A: Go to the Extension page in your Joblit dashboard and generate a new token. Tokens last 90 days.
extensionGuide.faq5A: The Knowledge Base stores your field corrections. When you edit a value in the widget and save, it creates a rule. Next time you apply to the same ATS, that rule auto-fills the correct value. Manage all rules at the Extension page in your dashboard.

jobs.rescoreNoProfileDesc: We need your skills and experience to compute match scores.

matchScore.notScoredDesc: Save a resume profile and click "Rescore all" to compute fit.

resume.masterResumesDesc: Maintain multiple base resume versions and choose which one drives your CV and CL generation.

guide.welcomeDesc: Your AI-powered job search command center. Let us show you how to fetch roles, tailor your CV, and auto-fill applications.
guide.welcomeFeature1: Fetch job listings from LinkedIn, Seek, and more
guide.welcomeFeature2: Generate AI-tailored resumes and cover letters
guide.welcomeFeature3: Auto-fill applications with the Chrome Extension

guide.waitingForElement: Select a job on the left to continue.
guide.task_resume_setup_desc: Save your base resume profile. This is the foundation for all tailored CVs.
guide.task_first_fetch_desc: Start a fetch run to import fresh job listings into your workspace.
guide.task_review_jobs_desc: Open a job to review the details and decide if it's worth applying for.
guide.task_generate_first_pdf_desc: Select a job and generate a tailored resume PDF from your master resume.
guide.task_mark_applied_desc: Mark a job as Applied to keep your application status organised.
guide.task_install_extension_desc: Get the Joblit Chrome Extension to auto-fill job applications on Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, and more — right from your browser.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Joblit ("we," "us," or "our") operates the Joblit web application (the "Service"). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our Service. By accessing or using the Service, you agree to this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please discontinue use immediately.
privacy.s1_1: When you sign in via Google or GitHub OAuth, we receive your name, email address, and profile avatar from the identity provider. We do not receive, store, or have access to your passwords.
privacy.s1_2: The Service fetches publicly available job listings from third-party platforms (LinkedIn, Seek, and others) on your behalf. These listings — including job title, company name, location, job type, and description — are stored in your account for your personal use only.
privacy.s1_3: You may create, upload, or edit resumes, cover letters, and application materials within the Service. This includes your professional summary, work experience, skills, education, and any other information you choose to provide. This content is stored securely and associated with your account.
privacy.s1_4: We automatically collect standard usage information including browser type, device type, operating system, pages visited, features used, and timestamps. This data is used solely for analytics, performance monitoring, and improving the Service. We do not use this data for advertising or sell it to third parties.
privacy.s1_5: We use essential cookies for authentication session management and locale preferences. We do not use advertising cookies, tracking pixels, or third-party analytics cookies. Local storage may be used to cache non-sensitive UI preferences (e.g., skill pack version metadata).
privacy.s2: We use your information exclusively to: provide, operate, and maintain the Service; authenticate your identity and manage your account; generate tailored resumes and cover letters based on your profile and job listings; improve, optimize, and develop new features for the Service; communicate with you about updates, security alerts, or issues related to the Service; and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.s3: When you use the resume/cover letter generation feature, your professional profile data and the target job description are sent to AI providers (currently Google Gemini) for content generation. We send only the minimum data necessary for the task. Your data is not used by AI providers for model training (per their API terms). AI-generated content is returned to you and stored in your account. You may also export your AI prompt rules as a Skill Pack ZIP for use with external AI services (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini) — in this case, your resume snapshot is included in the download and you control where it is uploaded.
privacy.s4: Your data is stored in a PostgreSQL database hosted on Neon (neon.tech). The application is deployed on Vercel (vercel.com). File attachments (PDFs, generated documents) are stored in Vercel Blob Storage. All data is transmitted over HTTPS/TLS encryption. Database connections use SSL. We implement commercially reasonable security measures including encrypted storage, access controls, and regular security reviews. However, no method of electronic storage or transmission is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s5Intro: We use the following third-party services, each operating under its own privacy policy:
privacy.s5Vercel: Vercel — for application hosting, serverless functions, and blob storage
privacy.s5Gemini: Google Gemini API — for AI-powered resume and cover letter content generation
privacy.s5Latex: LaTeX rendering service — for PDF compilation (receives document content only, no personal identifiers)
privacy.s5Note: We encourage you to review the privacy policies of these services.
privacy.s6: We do not sell, rent, trade, or otherwise share your personal information with third parties for marketing or advertising purposes. We may share data only: with third-party service providers listed above, solely for operating the Service; if required by law, regulation, legal process, or governmental request; to protect the rights, property, or safety of Joblit, our users, or the public; in connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets (you will be notified of any such change).
privacy.s7: We use only essential, first-party cookies required for the Service to function. Specifically: a session cookie for authentication (managed by NextAuth); a locale preference cookie (managed by next-intl). We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, or any third-party tracking or advertising technologies. We do not engage in cross-site tracking.
privacy.s8: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. You may delete individual job records, applications, and generated documents at any time through the Service interface. To request complete account deletion and removal of all associated data, contact us at the email below. We will process deletion requests within 30 days. Some data may be retained in encrypted backups for up to 90 days after deletion, after which it is permanently removed.
privacy.s9Intro: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.s9Gdpr: Under GDPR (EU/EEA): Right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and objection. Right to withdraw consent at any time. Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
privacy.s9Ccpa: Under CCPA (California): Right to know what personal information is collected, right to delete, right to opt-out of sale (we do not sell data), right to non-discrimination for exercising rights.
privacy.s9Aus: Under the Australian Privacy Act: Right to access and correct your personal information. Right to complain to the Office of the Australian Information Commissioner (OAIC).
privacy.s9Exercise: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at the email address below. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.s10: Your data may be processed and stored in countries outside your country of residence, including the United States (Vercel, AI providers) and other jurisdictions where our service providers operate. By using the Service, you consent to the transfer of your information to these countries. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, including standard contractual clauses where applicable.
privacy.s11Intro: The Service is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law:
privacy.s11_1: We make no warranties, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of job listings fetched from third-party sources. Job data is sourced from public platforms and may be outdated, inaccurate, or incomplete.
privacy.s11_2: We are not responsible for any employment decisions, application outcomes, or consequences arising from your use of the Service.
privacy.s11_3: AI-generated content (resumes, cover letters, skill packs) is provided as a starting point and should be reviewed and edited by you before submission to any employer. We are not liable for any errors, omissions, or misrepresentations in AI-generated content.
privacy.s11_4: We shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, or business opportunities, arising from your use of or inability to use the Service.
privacy.s11_5: Our total aggregate liability for any claims arising from the Service shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim, or AUD $100, whichever is greater.
privacy.s11_6: We are not responsible for any data loss resulting from third-party service outages, including but not limited to Vercel, Neon, AI provider, or internet connectivity disruptions.
privacy.s12: The Service is not intended for use by anyone under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 16. If we become aware that we have collected personal information from a child under 16, we will take steps to delete that information promptly.
privacy.s13: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. For significant changes, we may also notify you via email or an in-app notification. Your continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s14: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, wish to exercise your data rights, or have a privacy-related complaint, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Joblit web application (the "Service") operated by Joblit ("we," "us," or "our"). By accessing or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
terms.s1: By creating an account or using the Service, you confirm that you are at least 16 years of age and have the legal capacity to enter into these Terms. If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.
terms.s2: Joblit is a job search workflow tool that allows you to: fetch job listings from third-party platforms; create and manage resume profiles; generate AI-tailored resumes and cover letters matched to specific job descriptions; export documents as professional PDF files; and download AI Skill Packs for use with external AI services. The Service is provided as a web application accessible via modern web browsers.
terms.s3: You must sign in using a Google or GitHub account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account. We are not liable for any loss or damage arising from your failure to maintain account security.

terms.s4_3: Use automated tools, bots, or scrapers to access the Service beyond the intended functionality
terms.s4_4: Upload content that is defamatory, obscene, fraudulent, or infringes on any third-party rights

terms.s4_6: Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble any part of the Service

terms.s4_8: Use the Service to submit fraudulent job applications or misrepresent your qualifications
terms.s5_1: Your Content: You retain all ownership rights to the content you create, upload, or input into the Service, including your resume data, cover letters, and professional information. By using the Service, you grant us a limited, non-exclusive license to process, store, and display your content solely for the purpose of providing the Service to you.
terms.s5_2: Our Service: The Service, including its design, code, algorithms, AI prompt rules, skill pack templates, documentation, and all related intellectual property, is owned by Joblit and protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works of the Service without our express written permission.
terms.s5_3: AI-Generated Output: Content generated by AI through the Service (tailored resumes, cover letters) is provided to you for your personal and professional use. You are free to use, edit, and submit AI-generated content as your own. We make no claim of ownership over AI-generated output.
terms.s5_4: Feedback: If you provide feedback, suggestions, or ideas about the Service, you grant us an unrestricted, perpetual, irrevocable license to use such feedback for any purpose without compensation to you.
terms.s6: The Service uses artificial intelligence to generate resume and cover letter content. You acknowledge and agree that: AI-generated content may contain errors, inaccuracies, or inappropriate phrasing; you are solely responsible for reviewing, editing, and verifying all AI-generated content before use; AI-generated content should not be submitted to employers without your review and approval; we do not guarantee that AI-generated content will result in job interviews, offers, or any specific outcomes; AI-generated content does not constitute professional career advice, legal advice, or any form of professional consultation.
terms.s7: The Service fetches job listings from third-party platforms. We do not control, verify, or guarantee the accuracy of third-party job data. Job listings may be outdated, removed, or inaccurate. We are not responsible for the content of third-party job listings or the actions of employers posting those listings. Your interactions with employers are solely between you and the employer.
terms.s8: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, JOBLIT AND ITS OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, BUSINESS OPPORTUNITIES, OR GOODWILL, WHETHER BASED ON WARRANTY, CONTRACT, TORT (INCLUDING NEGLIGENCE), OR ANY OTHER LEGAL THEORY, EVEN IF ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES. OUR TOTAL AGGREGATE LIABILITY FOR ALL CLAIMS ARISING FROM OR RELATED TO THE SERVICE SHALL NOT EXCEED THE GREATER OF (A) THE AMOUNT YOU PAID US IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM, OR (B) AUD $100.
terms.s9: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Joblit and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from: your use of the Service; your violation of these Terms; your violation of any rights of a third party; any content you submit to the Service; or your use of AI-generated content in job applications or other contexts.
terms.s10: We may suspend or terminate your access to the Service at any time, with or without cause, and with or without notice. You may stop using the Service at any time. Upon termination, your right to use the Service ceases immediately. We may retain your data for a reasonable period to comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, or enforce our agreements. To request data deletion upon termination, contact us at the email below.
